VERNET BEHRINGER steel plate and profile processing
branchvernet
Your browser does not support the video tag.
Vernet Behringer
We offer machining equipment and fully automated production lines for steel and metal construction companies.
Welcome to
Vernet Behringer
With our many years of experience and our future-oriented and innovative approach, we offer companies in the steel construction, metal construction, plant engineering and lattice mast construction sectors a comprehensive range of machines and systems to make your production as efficient as possible. From conception to realisation, our specialists advise you at eye level and work with you to develop customised production solutions.
Vernet Behringer
systems are characterised by innovation, high processing speed, low operating costs and durability. With our software solutions, we seamlessly link the production plants to your company software and ensure a smooth flow of information.
Vernet Behringer
is a brand of the
Behringer
group of companies.
learn more about us
Profile Lines
Versatile and productive CNC lines combining operations like marking, drilling, milling, punching and many other ones of steel products.
DISCOVER OUR PROFILE LINES
Plate Machines
Versatile and productive CNC machines combining various operations like marking, drilling, milling, plasma cutting of steel plates.
DISCOVER OUR PLATE MACHINES
P4S Systems Solutions
Complete lines for profile steel processing from a single source.

products.text:
Profile machining centres – drilling, milling, sawing, marking of profile steel
branchvernet
Your browser does not support the video tag.
Profile Processing Solutions
High‑performance processing machines and fully automated production lines for steel and metal fabrication companies.
Products
VERNET Profile Lines
Profile Lines
High-performance lines for steel H-beams, angles, channels profiles and rectangular and square hollow sections machining
For steel construction companies, profile processing machines are the backbone of their production. Durable, robust machines and an efficient material flow with high plant throughput are decisive competitive advantages.
Vernet Behringer
offers versatile and productive CNC lines that combine machining steps such as marking, drilling, milling, punching, sawing and many more. Our machines are suitable for machining steel products such as H-beams, U-profiles, angles, flat steels and rectangular hollow profiles.
With a focus on short processing times and, at the same time, high system throughput, material handling and the seamless connection of different process steps are becoming increasingly important. By linking different machines and handling systems, fully automated production lines are created that are specially tailored to the needs and circumstances of the customer. The smooth connection and integration of these systems into the existing IT infrastructure are also part of our comprehensive range of services in this specialist area.
HDX
Profile steel machining with high performance
The HDX machining centre is the fastest drilling, milling and marking machine on the market. Thanks to its 4 independent machining axes, H, U and angle profiles as well as flat steel and rectangular tubes can be machined on 3 or 4 sides simultaneously.
read more
HDV
Compact drilling, marking & milling machine
The HDV has been specially designed for drilling, milling and marking rectangular tubes and lighter sections from
40 x 40
1,000 x 450 mm
read more
maps
Profile punch-shear line
Its unique machine concept combines punching and shearing of H-beams, channels, angles and flats in one unit. It is designed for medium to large batch sizes and fully automatic operation.
read more
HDL
Mono-spindle profile drilling machine
The HDL enables economical drilling and tapping of smaller plates, angles, tubes and profiles.
read more
VPX
Versatile and ultra-productive angle line
Vernet Behringer
angle lines cover all your machining operations: marking, punching, drilling, shearing, sawing, notching and edge milling. These machines combine high output and great ease of use. They are ideal for manufacturers of lattice towers and structural steel builders seeking maximum productivity and precision machining.
VPX94
Angle punching & shearing lines
Capacity:
90 x 9 mm
More
